original_image_tags: Clipping is a yellowed newspaper column snippet with a black border drawn around it. Text is in a multi-column, serif font.
A pre-printed routing slip stamped in purple ink on the right side of the page.

elements.description: One newspaper clipping with the headline 'FLYING SAUCER' REPORT' and subheadline 'MAY BE BALLOON'. The text details an object seen by three girls near Preston and mentions an Air Ministry explanation. Text at the bottom left of the page reads 'DAILY TELEGRAPH AND MORNING POST', 'APRIL 11, 1950', 'LONDON, ENGLAND'.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific verbatim text (headline, subheadline, newspaper name, date, location) that Description A does not mention at all, indicating a major discrepancy in the visual content described.
